course.title: Principles of Marketing: An AI-Integrated Approach
course.tagline: Everything you need to teach Principles of Marketing — with AI, hands-on.
course.subtitle: A complete, instructor-ready courseware package: a dual-depth interactive textbook, slides, teaching notes, projects, an AI-graded test bank, and a deploy kit — built for the AI era and held to WCAG 2.2 AA.

groups.title: Read & Reference
groups.blurb: The ground-truth text students read, plus the reference layer built on top of it.

groups.title: Teach
groups.blurb: What you bring to the room: slides, notes, videos, cases, and live activities.

groups.title: Assess
groups.blurb: Graded work, hands-on projects, and the question banks behind them.

groups.title: Adopt & Deploy
groups.blurb: Drop the course into your term and your LMS with the paperwork done.

groups.title: Build
groups.blurb: Go further: stand up your own AI teaching assistant on the course corpus.

components.title: Textbook
components.blurb: 27 chapters, each readable two ways — Comprehensive or Concise — with interactive AI widgets.

components.title: Glossary
components.blurb: Every key term defined in plain language and cross-linked back to its chapter.

components.title: AI Prompt Library
components.blurb: Copy-paste prompts that turn each chapter's framework into a hands-on AI exercise.

components.title: Datasets
components.blurb: Clean, classroom-ready datasets behind the projects and in-chapter analyses.

components.title: Slides
components.blurb: Lecture decks per chapter, on the book's visual system, ready to present or edit.

components.title: Teaching Notes / Instructor Guide
components.blurb: Session-by-session guidance: timing, talking points, discussion prompts, and pitfalls.

components.title: Lecture Videos
components.blurb: Short, animated lecture videos — the first chapter is recorded, the rest are in production.

components.title: Cases
components.blurb: Teaching cases with discussion questions, tied to the chapters' running brand examples.

components.title: In-class Kit
components.blurb: Live polls, think-pair-share prompts, and quick activities to run the room.

components.title: Assignments
components.blurb: Graded individual assignments mapped to each chapter's learning objectives.

components.title: Projects P1–P3
components.blurb: Three scaffolded team projects that take a real brand from research to a marketing plan.

components.title: Test & Quiz Bank
components.blurb: A large bank of quiz and exam items, tagged by chapter and objective, export-ready.

components.title: Rubrics
components.blurb: Transparent grading rubrics for every project and major assignment.

components.title: Answer Keys
components.blurb: Worked solutions and model answers for assignments and the test bank.

components.title: Syllabus + Pacing Guide
components.blurb: An editable syllabus and a week-by-week pacing guide you can adapt to your term.

components.title: Canvas / LMS Cartridge
components.blurb: A Common Cartridge import that drops modules, assignments, and the test bank into your LMS.

components.title: AACSB Outcomes Map
components.blurb: A mapping of chapters and assessments to AACSB assurance-of-learning outcomes.

components.title: Accessibility / VPAT
components.blurb: The courseware ships compliant by default; this documents how and where it conforms.

components.title: Get Started / Adopt
components.blurb: A short path from curious to teaching: what's ready now and how to put it to work.

components.title: What's New / Roadmap
components.blurb: What just shipped and what's coming next, so you always know the state of the package.

components.title: Build an AI Teaching Assistant
components.blurb: A guided track to stand up your own AI assistant grounded in this course's materials.
